uplink.description: SND-ALARM uplink (TTN example): cumulative volume 25041.978 m^3 + LOW_BATTERY
uplink._note: Input bytes from the upstream uplinkDecoder example (Apache-2.0). Expected metering.water.total derived by running the upstream OMS decoder as oracle: first VOLUME record value=25041978, VIF exponent=-3 -> 25041.978 m^3 x 1000 = 25041978 L. status=4 -> LOW_BATTERY.

uplink.description: Synthetic plaintext OMS frame on fPort 21: 1234.567 m^3, no alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic short-header frame (CI=0x7A, accessNo=42, status=0, config=0), single VOLUME record DIF=0x04 (32-bit int) VIF=0x13 (m^3 x10^-3), value LE 0x0012d687 = 1234567 -> 1234.567 m^3 x 1000 = 1234567 L. Verified against the upstream oracle.

uplink.description: Synthetic plaintext OMS frame on fPort 20: 1000 m^3 with multiple status alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic frame, status=0xB6, VOLUME record DIF=0x84/DIFE=0x04 VIF=0x13, value LE 0x000f4240 = 1000000 -> 1000 m^3 x 1000 = 1000000 L. Alarm set and ordering verified against the upstream oracle.
The upstream decoder returns {} for any fPort other than 20/21/22; our codec returns an explicit error. No oracle volume.
